case_title: SUHAIL SULEMAN VS. STARTUPPERZ INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION DBA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SULEMAN, SUHAIL AS TO DEFENDANT STARTUPPERZ INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION DBA ADVISOR JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
